manual_status.notes: The official board manual has not been imported yet. Current entries are observed from the connected Atlas runtime and should be completed from the manual before hardware-critical use.

ports.name: ethernet_lan
ports.label: Ethernet LAN port
ports.notes: Observed PC-to-Atlas wired link. SSH listens on TCP 22; Micius remote tool server listens on TCP 8765.

ports.name: usb_host_camera
ports.label: USB host port for UVC camera
ports.notes: Observed Generic UVC USB2.0 PC CAMERA. Primary frame device is /dev/video0; /dev/video1 also appears.

ports.name: manifest_mock
ports.label: Micius manifest mock source
ports.notes: Used before real sensors are wired. Replace with exact GPIO/I2C/SPI/CAN/serial port facts after manual import.

peripherals.name: usb_camera0
peripherals.notes: Registered in the Atlas manifest during bring-up. Use /camera describe or capture_camera_frame.

peripherals.name: front_distance
peripherals.notes: Safe test input for obstacle-avoidance DSL. Critical threshold used so far: 0.35 m.

safety_notes: Do not drive actuators from this profile until the official port voltage, current, and pin-mode limits are recorded.
Treat all non-observed connector names as manual_pending until extracted from the board manual.
